templates.summary: Open ARRAYEDIT on the drawing's last associative array and select the Reset or Source subcommand.

subcommand.description: ARRAYEDIT option-menu letter after selecting the last associative array: RES(재설정/Reset) or S(원본/Source). Measured live (cert wave 2, Korean-locale build): the menu is [원본(S)/대치(REP)/기준점(B)/행(R)/열(C)/레벨(L)/재설정(RES)/종료(X)] -- the spelled words 'Reset'/'Source' are NOT accepted as commands, and 'ARRAYEDIT L' takes the single array directly (no blank selection-terminator line; a blank here consumes the menu's <종료> default and exits early).

templates.notes: Rebuilt 2026-07-08 (cert wave 2) from live stdout: dropped the blank selection-terminator (ARRAYEDIT's '배열 선택:' is a single pick, and the blank fell through to the option menu's exit default), switched subcommand values to the menu's real option letters, and exit the menu with 'X'.
